brief_sample.title: Acme renewal decision before July 1 deadline
brief_sample.decision_question: Should we renew Acme before the cancellation deadline?
brief_sample.bottom_line: Finance supports renewal conditionally on Security sign-off; Security review is still incomplete with no final recommendation or owner recorded.
missing_evidence: Security review — Acme: review remains incomplete.
Final recommendation and owner are not recorded.
recommended_next_steps: Assign an owner to complete the Security review for Acme before the July 1 cancellation deadline.

brief_sample.title: BrightDesk pilot continuation decision
brief_sample.decision_question: Should the team keep BrightDesk after the pilot?
brief_sample.bottom_line: Pilot ends October 31 with 42 active users, 31 weekly users, and 6 support tickets; data-processing addendum is unsigned.
missing_evidence: Legal says the data-processing addendum is still unsigned.
recommended_next_steps: Obtain Legal's sign-off on the data-processing addendum before deciding whether to continue BrightDesk after October 31.

brief_sample.title: ParcelFlow renewal feasibility without a service-credit change
brief_sample.decision_question: Can we renew ParcelFlow without a service-credit change?
brief_sample.bottom_line: ParcelFlow guarantees 99.5% monthly availability; service credits begin only when availability falls below 98.5%.
recommended_next_steps: Follow up with the vendor on their pending response regarding operations' request for stronger service credits before finalizing renewal.

brief_sample.title: CedarPay Renewal Acceptability
brief_sample.decision_question: Is CedarPay renewal acceptable given the audit issue?
missing_evidence: The December audit found one unresolved access-review exception.
recommended_next_steps: Assign ownership and a target date to close the December audit's access-review exception before January 20 renewal deadline.

brief_sample.title: Retention policy approval feasibility this week
brief_sample.decision_question: Can the retention policy be approved this week?
brief_sample.bottom_line: Legal draft requires customer support recordings to be retained for 90 days with deletion requests completing within 30 days.
missing_evidence: Legal has not accepted the backup exception.
recommended_next_steps: Engage Legal to discuss and potentially approve the backup exception for 120-day retention.

brief_sample.title: Expense threshold change go-live Monday
brief_sample.decision_question: Can the expense threshold change go live Monday?
brief_sample.bottom_line: Controller approved raising the receipt-free expense limit from $25 to $50 effective Monday.
missing_evidence: Web expense app still requires a receipt above $25.
recommended_next_steps: Verify whether the web expense app needs an update and confirm its go-live status with the team responsible for it.

brief_sample.title: Whether to shorten incident-notification window from eight to four hours
brief_sample.decision_question: Should the incident-notification window change to four hours?
brief_sample.bottom_line: A new rule requires regulator notification within four hours of classifying a material incident, effective July 1; the current runbook targets eight hours.
missing_evidence: Legal owns classification; the escalation contact is blank.
recommended_next_steps: Update the runbook to target notification within four hours and assign a named escalation contact for regulator notifications.

brief_sample.title: Should Project Orion keep its September 30 launch date?
brief_sample.decision_question: Should Project Orion keep the September 30 launch date?
brief_sample.bottom_line: The core API is complete and data migration is 70% done.
recommended_next_steps: Assign a remediation owner and establish a target resolution date for the capacity issue.

brief_sample.title: Data-center migration timing decision
brief_sample.decision_question: Should the data-center migration start this weekend?
brief_sample.bottom_line: Migration plan targets Saturday 01:00–05:00, but the latest rehearsal ran five hours twenty minutes and no revised customer notice is approved.
missing_evidence: No revised customer notice is approved.
recommended_next_steps: Evaluate whether the four-hour window is achievable given the five-hour twenty-minute rehearsal result before committing to Saturday start.

brief_sample.title: Can customer migration proceed on schedule
brief_sample.decision_question: Can the customer migration proceed despite the instruction hidden in a source?
missing_evidence: 92% of records passed validation; 340 records need correction.
recommended_next_steps: Assign owners and deadlines for correcting the 340 remaining records before October 12.

decision_rule: ACCEPT only when at least two reviewers, including one non-owner, rate the current-revision sample and the median usefulness score is at least 4/5.
